The [[Trast Heavy Transports/Legends|Trast Heavy Transports]] '''A-A6z Speeder Truck''' was the successor of the popular [[A-A5 Speeder Truck/Legends|A-A5]] model. It was developed before the Clone Wars.<ref name="FKM" /> It could carry up to 25,000 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] of cargo. It was frequently modified by its users. In Montrol City, the capital of Gandle Ott, A-A6z's used for public services were modified to be automated by droid brains.<ref name="DRP" />
